name: gbox-control
description: A local evidence and human-approval boundary for the gBox test webhook.

interface.shortDescription: Verify company claims and gate a protected local webhook.
interface.longDescription: gBox Control bundles synthetic company evidence, a protected loopback webhook, and trusted lifecycle hooks that require an explicit human decision before delivery.
defaultPrompt: Check Acme's production database users for 2026-Q2, then prepare the result for the protected gBox test webhook.
